## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, tokens, or credentials committed
- [ ] No real production IPs, customer hostnames, or internal domains in examples
- [ ] No customer data or personal identifiers
- [ ] Demo/sample values are generic (e.g. `192.168.100.x`, `EXAMPLE.LOCAL`)
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes documented in PR description
- [ ] Offensive/simulation changes include safety notes if applicable
